# TDS (Taein Design System) — Full API Reference

> A lightweight (~23KB gzip), beginner-friendly, AI-ready React + TypeScript design system built with Vanilla Extract CSS (zero-runtime). Only 2 runtime dependencies.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @taein-designsystem/core
# or
pnpm add @taein-designsystem/core
```

## Setup

```tsx
// main.tsx
import '@taein-designsystem/core/styles.css';
import { ThemeProvider } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider>
      <YourApp />
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

## API Patterns

All components follow consistent patterns:
- `variant` — Visual style (e.g., 'primary' | 'dark' | 'light')
- `size` — Component size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg')
- `disabled` — Disabled state (boolean)
- `className` — Additional CSS class (string)
- `ref` — All components support forwardRef
- Form components require `label` prop for accessibility

---

## TextField

Text input with label, validation, and helper text.

```tsx
import { TextField } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<TextField
  label="이메일"
  type="email"
  placeholder="example@email.com"
  value={value}
  onChange={(e) => setValue(e.target.value)}
  error={!isValid}
  errorMessage="올바른 이메일을 입력하세요"
  helperText="회사 이메일을 입력해주세요"
  size="md"
  fullWidth
  required
/>
```

### Props (extends InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| type | 'text' \| 'email' \| 'password' \| 'number' \| 'tel' \| 'url' | 'text' | Input type |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Input size |
| error | boolean | false | Error state |
| errorMessage | string | — | Error message |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| fullWidth | boolean | false | Full width |
| required | boolean | — | Required attribute |
| disabled | boolean | — | Disabled attribute |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### Accessibility
- `aria-invalid` set automatically when `error` is true
- `aria-describedby` linked to helper/error text
- Label always connected via `htmlFor`/`id`

---

## TextArea

Multiline text input with optional auto-resize.

```tsx
import { TextArea } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<TextArea
  label="설명"
  placeholder="내용을 입력하세요"
  value={value}
  onChange={(e) => setValue(e.target.value)}
  autoResize
  height={150}
  size="md"
/>
```

### Props (extends TextareaHTMLAttributes<HTMLTextAreaElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | TextArea size |
| autoResize | boolean | false | Auto-adjust height to content |
| height | string \| number | 120 | Minimum height |
| error | boolean | false | Error state |
| errorMessage | string | — | Error message |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| fullWidth | boolean | false | Full width |
| required | boolean | — | Required attribute |
| disabled | boolean | — | Disabled attribute |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Checkbox

Checkbox with label and indeterminate state support.

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Checkbox
  label="약관에 동의합니다"
  checked={checked}
  onChange={(e) => setChecked(e.target.checked)}
  size="md"
/>

// Indeterminate
<Checkbox label="전체 선택" indeterminate={isPartial} />
```

### Props (extends InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Checkbox size |
| error | boolean | false | Error state |
| errorMessage | string | — | Error message |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| indeterminate | boolean | false | Indeterminate state |
| required | boolean | — | Required attribute |
| disabled | boolean | — | Disabled attribute |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Switch

Toggle switch with label.

```tsx
import { Switch } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Switch
  label="알림 받기"
  checked={enabled}
  onChange={(e) => setEnabled(e.target.checked)}
  size="md"
/>
```

### Props (extends InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Switch size |
| error | boolean | false | Error state |
| errorMessage | string | — | Error message |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| required | boolean | — | Required attribute |
| disabled | boolean | — | Disabled attribute |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Slider

Range slider with marks and value display.

```tsx
import { Slider } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Slider
  label="볼륨"
  min={0}
  max={100}
  step={5}
  value={volume}
  onChange={(e) => setVolume(Number(e.target.value))}
  showValue
  marks={[{ value: 0, label: '0' }, { value: 100, label: '100' }]}
/>
```

### Props (extends InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Slider size |
| min | number | 0 | Minimum value |
| max | number | 100 | Maximum value |
| step | number | 1 | Step increment |
| showValue | boolean | false | Display current value |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| marks | { value: number; label: string }[] | — | Marks on track |
| trackColor | string | — | Fill track color |
| value | number | — | Controlled value |
| defaultValue | number | 0 | Initial value (uncontrolled) |
| disabled | boolean | — | Disabled attribute |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## NumericSpinner

Number input with increment/decrement buttons.

```tsx
import { NumericSpinner } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<NumericSpinner
  label="수량"
  value={qty}
  onChange={(e) => setQty(Number(e.target.value))}
  min={1}
  max={99}
  step={1}
  size="md"
/>
```

### Props (extends InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| value | number | — | Controlled value |
| defaultValue | number | — | Initial value (uncontrolled) |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Input size |
| inputWidth | string | — | Custom input width |
| min | number | — | Minimum value |
| max | number | — | Maximum value |
| step | number | 1 | Increment step |
| error | boolean | false | Error state |
| errorMessage | string | — | Error message |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| fullWidth | boolean | false | Full width |
| required | boolean | — | Required attribute |
| disabled | boolean | — | Disabled attribute |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Button

Primary action button with variants, loading, and icons.

```tsx
import { Button } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Button variant="primary" size="md" onClick={handleClick}>
  저장하기
</Button>

<Button variant="dark" buttonStyle="weak" leftIcon={<Icon name="plus" />}>
  추가
</Button>

<Button loading disabled>처리 중...</Button>
```

### Props (extends ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | 'primary' \| 'dark' \| 'danger' \| 'light' | 'primary' | Button variant |
| buttonStyle | 'fill' \| 'weak' | 'fill' | Fill or outline style |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | 'md' | Button size |
| fullWidth | boolean | false | Stretch to full width |
| loading | boolean | false | Show loading spinner |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable button |
| leftIcon | ReactNode | — | Icon before text |
| rightIcon | ReactNode | — | Icon after text |
| customColor | { bg: string; text: string; hoverBg?: string; activeBg?: string } | — | Custom colors |
| children | ReactNode | — | Button text |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### Accessibility
- `aria-disabled` set when disabled or loading
- `aria-busy` set when loading
- `aria-hidden="true"` on decorative icons

---

## IconButton

Icon-only button. Requires `aria-label` for accessibility.

```tsx
import { IconButton, Icon } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<IconButton variant="primary" aria-label="닫기" onClick={handleClose}>
  <Icon name="close" />
</IconButton>

<IconButton ghost aria-label="메뉴">
  <Icon name="plus" />
</IconButton>
```

### Props (extends ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | 'primary' \| 'dark' \| 'danger' \| 'light' | 'primary' | Button variant |
| buttonStyle | 'fill' \| 'weak' | 'fill' | Fill or outline style |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | 'md' | Button size |
| ghost | boolean | false | Ghost style (no background) |
| loading | boolean | false | Loading state |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disabled state |
| children | ReactNode | — | Icon content |
| aria-label | string | — | Required accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## SegmentedButtons

Button group for single selection.

```tsx
import { SegmentedButtons } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<SegmentedButtons
  options={[
    { value: 'list', label: '목록' },
    { value: 'grid', label: '그리드' },
    { value: 'map', label: '지도' },
  ]}
  value={view}
  onChange={setView}
  size="md"
  aria-label="보기 방식"
/>
```

### Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| options | { value: string; label: string; icon?: ReactNode; iconOnly?: boolean; disabled?: boolean }[] | (required) | Button options |
| value | string | — | Selected value (controlled) |
| onChange | (value: string) => void | — | Change handler |
| defaultValue | string | — | Initial value (uncontrolled) |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Button size |
| fullWidth | boolean | false | Full width |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable all buttons |
| aria-label | string | — | Group label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Text

Typography component with semantic HTML.

```tsx
import { Text } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Text variant="h1">제목</Text>
<Text variant="body1" color="secondary">본문 텍스트</Text>
<Text variant="body2" truncate={2}>긴 텍스트는 2줄로 잘립니다...</Text>
```

### Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | — | Text content |
| variant | 'h1' \| 'h2' \| 'h3' \| 'h4' \| 'h5' \| 'h6' \| 'body1' \| 'body2' \| 'body3' | 'body1' | Text style |
| as | ElementType | — | Custom HTML element |
| color | 'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'disabled' | — | Text color |
| weight | 'regular' \| 'medium' \| 'semibold' \| 'bold' | — | Font weight |
| align | 'left' \| 'center' \| 'right' | — | Text alignment |
| truncate | 1 \| 2 \| 3 | — | Line clamp |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Badge

Status or count indicator.

```tsx
import { Badge } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Badge variant="primary">5</Badge>
<Badge variant="error" max={99}>150</Badge>
<Badge dot />
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | — | Badge content |
| variant | 'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' | 'primary' | Badge variant |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Badge size |
| max | number | 99 | Maximum value |
| dot | boolean | false | Dot mode |
| showZero | boolean | true | Show when value is 0 |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Chip

Tag or filter chip.

```tsx
import { Chip } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Chip label="React" />
<Chip label="삭제 가능" onDelete={() => {}} />
<Chip label="선택됨" clickable selected onClick={() => {}} />
```

### Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Chip label |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Chip size |
| variant | 'filled' \| 'outlined' | 'filled' | Chip variant |
| color | 'default' \| 'primary' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' | 'default' | Color |
| icon | ReactNode | — | Leading icon |
| avatar | ReactNode | — | Avatar element |
| onDelete | () => void | — | Delete callback |
| clickable | boolean | false | Make clickable |
| selected | boolean | false | Selected state |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disabled state |
| onClick | () => void | — | Click handler |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Avatar

User avatar with image, fallback, and status indicator.

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarGroup } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Avatar src="/photo.jpg" alt="사용자" size="lg" status="online" />
<Avatar alt="홍길동">홍</Avatar>

<AvatarGroup max={3} size="md">
  <Avatar src="/a.jpg" alt="A" />
  <Avatar src="/b.jpg" alt="B" />
  <Avatar src="/c.jpg" alt="C" />
  <Avatar src="/d.jpg" alt="D" />
</AvatarGroup>
```

### AvatarProps
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| src | string | — | Image URL |
| alt | string | (required) | Alt text |
| size | 'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | 'md' | Avatar size |
| variant | 'circular' \| 'rounded' \| 'square' | 'circular' | Border style |
| status | 'online' \| 'offline' \| 'busy' \| 'away' | — | Status indicator |
| children | ReactNode | — | Fallback content |
| onClick | () => void | — | Click handler |
| href | string | — | Link URL |
| onError | () => void | — | Image error callback |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### AvatarGroupProps
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Avatar components |
| max | number | — | Max visible avatars |
| size | 'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | — | Avatar size |
| spacing | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Overlap spacing |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Icon

SVG icon component.

```tsx
import { Icon } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Icon name="close" size="md" />
<Icon name="plus" color="#2563eb" aria-label="추가" />
```

### Props (extends SVGAttributes<SVGSVGElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| name | 'close' \| 'plus' \| 'minus' \| 'chevron-down' \| 'chevron-up' | (required) | Icon name |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | 'md' | Icon size |
| color | string | 'currentColor' | Icon color |
| aria-label | string | — | Accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Loader

Loading indicator with spinner, dots, or bar variants.

```tsx
import { Loader } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Loader type="spinner" size="md" />
<Loader type="dots" label="로딩 중..." />
<Loader fullScreen overlay />
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| type | 'spinner' \| 'dots' \| 'bar' | 'spinner' | Loader type |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | 'md' | Loader size |
| color | 'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'white' | 'primary' | Color preset |
| label | string | — | Text label |
| fullScreen | boolean | false | Full screen overlay |
| overlay | boolean | false | Semi-transparent overlay |
| aria-label | string | — | Accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## LoadingSpinner

Simple spinner or dots indicator.

```tsx
import { LoadingSpinner } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<LoadingSpinner type="spinner" size="md" />
<LoadingSpinner type="dots" />
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| type | 'spinner' \| 'dots' | 'spinner' | Spinner type |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | 'md' | Spinner size |
| color | string | primary[600] | Color value |
| aria-label | string | '로딩 중' | Accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Skeleton

Content placeholder with animation.

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Skeleton variant="text" width="80%" />
<Skeleton variant="rect" width={200} height={150} />
<Skeleton variant="circle" width={48} height={48} />
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | 'text' \| 'rect' \| 'circle' \| 'rounded' | 'text' | Shape variant |
| animation | 'wave' \| 'pulse' \| false | 'wave' | Animation type |
| width | number \| string | — | Width |
| height | number \| string | — | Height |
| aria-label | string | — | Accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Snackbar

Toast notification with auto-hide.

```tsx
import { Snackbar, Button } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Snackbar
  open={open}
  message="저장되었습니다"
  severity="success"
  position="bottom-center"
  autoHideDuration={3000}
  onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
  action={<Button size="sm" variant="light">취소</Button>}
/>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| open | boolean | (required) | Visibility state |
| message | ReactNode | (required) | Message content |
| severity | 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info' | 'info' | Message type |
| position | 'top-left' \| 'top-center' \| 'top-right' \| 'bottom-left' \| 'bottom-center' \| 'bottom-right' | 'bottom-center' | Position |
| autoHideDuration | number \| null | 6000 | Auto-close duration (ms) |
| onClose | () => void | — | Close callback |
| action | ReactNode | — | Action content |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Tooltip

Hover tooltip with arrow.

```tsx
import { Tooltip, Button } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Tooltip content="도움말 텍스트" position="top">
  <Button>호버하세요</Button>
</Tooltip>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Trigger element |
| content | ReactNode | (required) | Tooltip content |
| open | boolean | — | Controlled visibility |
| onOpenChange | (open: boolean) => void | — | State change callback |
| position | 'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right' | 'top' | Position |
| delay | number | 200 | Show delay (ms) |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable tooltip |
| arrow | boolean | true | Show arrow |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Modal

Dialog modal with compound components.

```tsx
import { Modal, Button } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

// Compound API
<Modal open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} size="md">
  <Modal.Header showClose>
    <Modal.Title>제목</Modal.Title>
  </Modal.Header>
  <Modal.Content>
    <p>모달 내용입니다.</p>
  </Modal.Content>
  <Modal.Footer align="right">
    <Button variant="light" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>취소</Button>
    <Button variant="primary" onClick={handleSave}>저장</Button>
  </Modal.Footer>
</Modal>

// Flat API
<Modal open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} title="제목" showClose footer={<Button>확인</Button>}>
  <p>내용</p>
</Modal>
```

### ModalProps (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| open | boolean | (required) | Visibility state |
| onClose | () => void | (required) | Close handler |
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Modal content |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' \| 'full' | 'md' | Modal size |
| closeOnBackdropClick | boolean | true | Close on backdrop click |
| closeOnEscape | boolean | true | Close on ESC key |
| title | string | — | Title (Flat mode) |
| showClose | boolean | false | Show close button (Flat mode) |
| footer | ReactNode | — | Footer (Flat mode) |
| footerAlign | 'left' \| 'center' \| 'right' | 'left' | Footer alignment |
| aria-label | string | — | Accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### Compound Components
- `Modal.Header` — Header container. Props: showClose
- `Modal.Title` — Heading. Props: as ('h1'-'h6', default 'h2')
- `Modal.Content` — Scrollable content area
- `Modal.Footer` — Footer. Props: align ('left' | 'center' | 'right')

### Accessibility
- `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal="true"`
- Focus trap (Tab cycles within modal)
- ESC key closes modal
- Focus restoration on close

---

## BottomSheet

Mobile bottom drawer with drag-to-close.

```tsx
import { BottomSheet } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<BottomSheet open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} height="md" enableDrag>
  <BottomSheet.Header>
    <BottomSheet.Title>제목</BottomSheet.Title>
  </BottomSheet.Header>
  <BottomSheet.Content>
    <p>바텀시트 내용</p>
  </BottomSheet.Content>
</BottomSheet>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| open | boolean | (required) | Visibility state |
| onClose | () => void | (required) | Close handler |
| title | ReactNode | — | Sheet title |
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Content |
| height | 'auto' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'full' | 'auto' | Sheet height |
| closeOnBackdropClick | boolean | true | Close on backdrop click |
| closeOnEscape | boolean | true | Close on ESC key |
| showHandle | boolean | true | Show drag handle |
| showClose | boolean | false | Show close button |
| enableDrag | boolean | true | Enable drag to close |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### Compound Components
- `BottomSheet.Header` — Header. Props: showClose
- `BottomSheet.Title` — Title heading
- `BottomSheet.Content` — Scrollable content

---

## SideSheet

Side panel drawer.

```tsx
import { SideSheet } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<SideSheet open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} width="md" position="right">
  <SideSheet.Header showClose>
    <SideSheet.Title>설정</SideSheet.Title>
  </SideSheet.Header>
  <SideSheet.Content>
    <p>사이드시트 내용</p>
  </SideSheet.Content>
</SideSheet>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| open | boolean | (required) | Visibility state |
| onClose | () => void | (required) | Close handler |
| title | ReactNode | — | Sheet title |
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Content |
| width | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'full' | 'md' | Sheet width |
| position | 'left' \| 'right' | 'right' | Position |
| closeOnBackdropClick | boolean | true | Close on backdrop |
| closeOnEscape | boolean | true | Close on ESC |
| showClose | boolean | false | Show close button |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### Compound Components
- `SideSheet.Header` — Header. Props: showClose
- `SideSheet.Title` — Title heading
- `SideSheet.Content` — Scrollable content

---

## Popover

Popover panel triggered by child element.

```tsx
import { Popover, Button } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Popover
  content={<div style={{ padding: '1rem' }}>팝오버 내용</div>}
  position="bottom"
  arrow
>
  <Button>열기</Button>
</Popover>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Trigger element |
| content | ReactNode | (required) | Popover content |
| open | boolean | — | Controlled visibility |
| onOpenChange | (open: boolean) => void | — | State change callback |
| position | 'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right' | 'bottom' | Position |
| closeOnOutsideClick | boolean | true | Close on outside click |
| closeOnEscape | boolean | true | Close on ESC |
| arrow | boolean | false | Show arrow |
| maxWidth | string | — | Maximum width |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable popover |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Card

Content container with compound components.

```tsx
import { Card } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

// Compound API
<Card variant="elevated">
  <Card.Image src="/photo.jpg" alt="설명" />
  <Card.Header>
    <Card.Title>카드 제목</Card.Title>
  </Card.Header>
  <Card.Body>
    <p>카드 내용입니다.</p>
  </Card.Body>
  <Card.Footer>
    <Button size="sm">자세히</Button>
  </Card.Footer>
</Card>

// Interactive Card
<Card variant="interactive" accentColor="#2563eb" onClick={handleClick}>
  <Card.Body padding="lg">클릭 가능한 카드</Card.Body>
</Card>
```

### CardProps (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Content |
| variant | 'outlined' \| 'elevated' \| 'filled' \| 'interactive' | 'elevated' | Card variant |
| onClick | () => void | — | Click handler |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable interactivity |
| accentColor | string | — | Accent color |
| title | string | — | Title (Flat mode) |
| image | string | — | Image URL (Flat mode) |
| imageAlt | string | '' | Image alt text (Flat mode) |
| padding | 'none' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Body padding (Flat mode) |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### Compound Components
- `Card.Image` — Image container. Props: src, alt, children (overlay)
- `Card.Header` — Header area
- `Card.Title` — Heading. Props: as ('h1'-'h6', default 'h3')
- `Card.Body` — Body area. Props: padding
- `Card.Footer` — Footer area

---

## List

List with spacing and dividers.

```tsx
import { List, ListItem } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<List spacing="md" divider>
  <ListItem label="이름" value="홍길동" />
  <ListItem label="이메일" value="hong@example.com" />
</List>
```

### ListProps (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLUListElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | (required) | List items |
| spacing | 'none' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Item spacing |
| divider | boolean | false | Show dividers |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

### ListItemProps (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLLIElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | ReactNode | — | Label (left) |
| value | ReactNode | — | Value (right) |
| children | ReactNode | — | Custom content |
| layout | 'horizontal' \| 'vertical' \| 'custom' | 'horizontal' | Layout |
| align | 'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'baseline' | 'center' | Alignment |
| labelWidth | string | — | Custom label width |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## BoardRow

Expandable row / accordion.

```tsx
import { BoardRow } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

// Uncontrolled
<BoardRow title="FAQ 제목" defaultExpanded={false}>
  <p>답변 내용입니다.</p>
</BoardRow>

// Controlled
<BoardRow title="제목" expanded={open} onChange={setOpen}>
  <p>내용</p>
</BoardRow>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| title | ReactNode | (required) | Header title |
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Content |
| variant | 'default' \| 'outlined' \| 'filled' | 'default' | Row variant |
| defaultExpanded | boolean | false | Initial state (uncontrolled) |
| expanded | boolean | — | Expanded state (controlled) |
| onChange | (expanded: boolean) => void | — | State change callback |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable expansion |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Divider

Content separator with optional text.

```tsx
import { Divider } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Divider />
<Divider variant="dashed" spacing="lg" />
<Divider textAlign="center">또는</Divider>
<Divider orientation="vertical" />
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | — | Divider text |
| orientation | 'horizontal' \| 'vertical' | 'horizontal' | Orientation |
| variant | 'solid' \| 'dashed' \| 'dotted' | 'solid' | Line style |
| spacing | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | Spacing |
| textAlign | 'left' \| 'center' \| 'right' | 'center' | Text alignment |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## Border

Border wrapper component.

```tsx
import { Border } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<Border sides="all" variant="solid" color="primary" rounded="md" padding="md">
  <p>테두리 안의 내용</p>
</Border>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | ReactNode | (required) | Content |
| sides | 'all' \| 'top' \| 'right' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'horizontal' \| 'vertical' | 'all' | Border sides |
| variant | 'solid' \| 'dashed' \| 'dotted' | 'solid' | Border style |
| width | 'thin' \| 'medium' \| 'thick' | 'thin' | Border width |
| color | 'default' \| 'primary' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' | 'default' | Border color |
| rounded | 'none' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'full' | 'none' | Border radius |
| padding | 'none' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'none' | Inner padding |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## HeaderBar

Application header bar.

```tsx
import { HeaderBar, IconButton, Icon } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<HeaderBar
  logo={<img src="/logo.svg" alt="Logo" />}
  title="My App"
  actions={
    <IconButton ghost aria-label="설정">
      <Icon name="plus" />
    </IconButton>
  }
  sticky
  variant="default"
/>
```

### Props (extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| logo | ReactNode | — | Logo element |
| title | ReactNode | — | Title/heading |
| children | ReactNode | — | Center content |
| actions | ReactNode | — | Right side actions |
| sticky | boolean | false | Sticky positioning |
| variant | 'default' \| 'dark' \| 'transparent' | 'default' | Header variant |
| elevation | boolean | false | Show shadow |
| border | boolean | true | Show border |
| aria-label | string | — | Accessibility label |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |

---

## FormField

Form field wrapper using render props pattern.

```tsx
import { FormField } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

<FormField label="이름" required error errorMessage="이름을 입력하세요">
  {({ inputId, helperId, hasHelper, isError }) => (
    <input
      id={inputId}
      aria-describedby={hasHelper ? helperId : undefined}
      aria-invalid={isError}
    />
  )}
</FormField>
```

### Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | (required) | Label text |
| helperText | string | — | Helper text |
| error | boolean | false | Error state |
| errorMessage | string | — | Error message |
| required | boolean | false | Required indicator |
| fullWidth | boolean | false | Full width |
| className | string | — | Additional CSS class |
| children | (props: { inputId, helperId, hasHelper, isError }) => ReactNode | (required) | Render function |

---

## Design Tokens

TDS uses `themeContract` for type-safe, theme-aware styling.

### Color Tokens
- `themeContract.color.primary.main` — Primary brand color
- `themeContract.color.primary.light` — Light primary
- `themeContract.color.primary.dark` — Dark primary
- `themeContract.color.text.primary` — Primary text
- `themeContract.color.text.secondary` — Secondary text
- `themeContract.color.text.disabled` — Disabled text
- `themeContract.color.background.default` — Page background
- `themeContract.color.background.paper` — Surface background
- `themeContract.color.surface.default` — Surface color
- `themeContract.color.border.default` — Default border
- `themeContract.color.border.strong` — Strong border
- `themeContract.color.semantic.success` — Success color
- `themeContract.color.semantic.error` — Error color
- `themeContract.color.semantic.warning` — Warning color
- `themeContract.color.semantic.info` — Info color

### Spacing (8pt grid)
- Values: 1 (4px), 2 (8px), 3 (12px), 4 (16px), 5 (20px), 6 (24px), 8 (32px), 10 (40px), 12 (48px), 16 (64px), 20 (80px)

### Typography
- Font family: Pretendard Variable (system fallback)
- Sizes: xs (0.75rem), sm (0.875rem), base (1rem), lg (1.125rem), xl (1.25rem), 2xl (1.5rem), 3xl (1.875rem), 4xl (2.25rem)
- Weights: regular (400), medium (500), semibold (600), bold (700)

### Border Radius
- none (0), sm (4px), base (6px), md (8px), lg (12px), xl (16px), full (9999px)

### Shadow
- sm, base, md, lg, xl — Increasing elevation levels

### Animation
- Durations: fast (150ms), normal (300ms), slow (500ms)
- Easings: default, easeIn, easeOut, easeInOut

---

## Accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA)

All components follow WCAG 2.2 AA standards:
- Semantic HTML elements (button, input, dialog, etc.)
- ARIA attributes (aria-label, aria-describedby, aria-invalid, aria-busy, aria-modal, aria-expanded)
- Keyboard navigation (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space, Escape, Arrow keys)
- Focus indicators (3px outline, 3:1 contrast ratio)
- Focus traps in overlays (Modal, BottomSheet, SideSheet)
- Color contrast: 4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for UI elements
- Touch targets: minimum 44x44px
- Screen reader announcements via aria-live regions
